name: Fantasy RPG Simulator | BDSM Theme
description:
A Fantasy RPG Simulator where you can do anything, literally everything. This RPG has a BDSM theme where sadists and masochists can be found.

Tested and it works well if you prompt or describe everything you need. If the bot responds incorrectly or makes a wrong choice, regenerate the response. If it still doesn't work, it may be the fault of the LLM.

Venus Chub Version

You may create a persona for this bot, including details such as age, gender, and other characteristics.

Features: You can disable any word or gender by prompting "Disable women" or "Disable men." The bot will repeat the narration and turn everyone into men or women. You can enable the words that got disabled by prompting "Enable men" or "Enable women." The bot can also enable any word you want to see, such as "femboys," "tomboys," etc.

Note: After disabling or enabling anything, use the chat memory for better narration. If you want to enable something again, remove the word from the chat memory and prompt to enable the word. If it doesn't work, try regenerating or deleting and repeating your message. If it still doesn't work, try being descriptive by describing the combined word, for example: "Enable women, and look around." If it doesn't work, don't blame me; the LLM can be complicated. When I tested it, it worked well.

Tags: BDSM RPG, Fantasy RPG, RPG
creator: Ayato Hayate
